home.hero.title: Build a faster web, without the fight.
home.hero.subtitle: A performance-first stack for teams that ship.
home.features.title: What you get
home.features.0.title: Edge-first delivery
home.features.0.desc: Global CDN with sub-5ms cold starts for your public content.
home.features.1.title: Streaming SSR
home.features.1.desc: Skeleton-first rendering that gets content in front of users faster.
home.features.2.title: Zero-config i18n
home.features.2.desc: Multi-locale out of the box with URL-based routing and hreflang.
home.features.3.title: Design tokens
home.features.3.desc: Semantic CSS variables that power light and dark mode with zero effort.
home.pricing.title: Pricing
home.pricing.0.name: Starter
home.pricing.1.name: Pro
home.pricing.1.desc: For growing teams that need more.
home.pricing.2.name: Enterprise
home.testimonials.title: Trusted by teams worldwide
home.testimonials.0.quote: We cut our Lighthouse scores review time by 80% after switching to this stack. The streaming SSR alone made our product page feel instant.
home.testimonials.0.name: Sarah Kim
home.testimonials.1.quote: The design token system is a game-changer. We ship light and dark mode simultaneously and our design team actually approves of the output.
home.testimonials.1.name: Marcus Rivera
home.testimonials.2.quote: Internationalization was painful before. Now it's just a folder and a URL parameter. We launched in Germany three weeks faster than planned.
home.testimonials.2.name: Aiko Lindström
